overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a rural area at night. The character travels along a dirt path, passes through tall grass, approaches a wooden cabin, and continues toward a lit house with a visible campfire.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path through open grassland

rolling green hills under dark cloudy sky
rolling green hills under dark cloudy sky

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt path through open grassland at night. The sky is overcast and the landscape is wide open with rolling hills visible in the distance. The character maintains a steady walking pace along the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown field with abandoned wooden cabin

events.description: wooden cabin comes into view ahead in the tall grass
character passes the wooden cabin on the right side

tall tree with dense dark foliage

segments.scene_description: Leaving the path behind, Geralt walks through dense tall grass and bushes toward a small wooden cabin. The vegetation becomes thicker as he approaches the abandoned structure, then passes it on the right side.

events.description: warm orange campfire light becomes visible from the house ahead
approaching the wooden porch of the lit house

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks toward a wooden house with visible campfire light glowing from the open porch area

entered.detail: wooden house with warm firelight glowing from windows and open porch
burning fire illuminating the house interior with orange light

segments.scene_description: After passing the cabin, Geralt approaches a larger wooden house with a welcoming campfire burning inside. The warm light contrasts with the cool blue night as he walks toward the structure, passing a wooden fence and approaching the porch.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a cool, nocturnal wilderness that transitions from open grasslands to the warm glow of a rural homestead. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path through wide, rolling hills under an overcast night sky. As he leaves the trail, the camera follows him into dense tall grass and thick bushes, moving past a small, abandoned wooden cabin. The scene then shifts toward a larger wooden house, where the cool blue tones of the night are replaced by the flickering orange light of a welcoming campfire. Finally, the movement leads him past a wooden fence and directly toward the porch of the lit structure.
